caption: The video captures a moment just before the start of a football match between Granada CF and Real Madrid, as indicated by the logos on the scoreboard. The scoreboard displays a 0-0 score with the time set at 00:01, suggesting that the game is about to begin. The scene is set in an empty stadium, likely due to restrictions or a pre-match setup, with the prominent Winamax and Caja Rural Granada advertisements visible on either side of the scoreboard. The time "22:00" in the bottom left corner indicates that it is 10 PM, adding to the anticipation of the upcoming match. The atmosphere is quiet and focused, with all eyes on the scoreboard awaiting the kickoff.
